summary: The 'next:pack-for-isolated-tests' build step failed to generate required distribution files, causing 498 errors for dist/api/error.d.ts and preventing Jest tests from running due to missing files (ENOENT errors).
root_cause: The 'next:pack-for-isolated-tests' build step failed to generate required type definition and compiled distribution files (dist/api/error.d.ts, dist/compiled/@babel/runtime/helpers/, dist/next-font-error.d.ts, etc.), resulting in missing files that Jest tests depend on.

evidence.reason: 498 errors from pack-for-isolated-tests for the same file indicates a systematic build/compilation failure in the packing step

evidence.quote: [×12] 2026-04-22T16:29:53.6809073Z Failed to load test output Error: ENOENT: no such file or directory
evidence.reason: ENOENT (no such file) errors indicate required dist files do not exist, a downstream symptom of the failed build step
Test execution failed because build artifacts that tests depend on were not generated
Multiple pack-for-isolated-tests errors across different dist paths (Babel, Font) show the build step is broadly failing to generate required files

suggested_fix: Review the output of the 'next:pack-for-isolated-tests' build step for the underlying error preventing dist/api/error.d.ts and other distribution files from being generated. Check for TypeScript compilation errors, missing source files, or build configuration issues.

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.
